lead_profile_text: Purchased specifically for STL. Converting 3-bed to 5-bed via garage conversion and loft extension. Renovation 2-3 months. Mortgage in place — target £1,000+/month profit after repayments.
emotional_profile: Motivated and entrepreneurial. Financially analytical — focused on hitting £1,000/month profit target. Patient with renovation timeline but needs reassurance on income gap in Year 1.
delay_trigger_phrases: I'll complete the renovation over the next 2-3 months
Schedule follow-up call for mid-August when renovation nears completion
green_light_trigger_phrases: My target is £1,000+ monthly profit after mortgage

top_objections.text: Year 1 projection of ~£800/month after mortgage falls short of £1,000 target
top_objections.zac_response: 5-bed ADR premium above 4-bed comparable; Year 2 trajectory with direct booking ramp closes the gap

top_objections.text: Getting the right type of guests (professional/academic preferred)
top_objections.zac_response: Coventry proximity to university and hospital drives professional guest profile; ID checks and deposit in place

top_objections.text: Renovation timeline dependency — can't commit until renovation is on track
top_objections.zac_response: August 10th follow-up call timed to renovation completion check

top_questions.answer: £200 security deposit, ID checks, £100k damage insurance

what_moved_them: Market conditions described as highly favourable — competition at only 36 reviews, 4.5 stars
Coventry proximity to university and hospital — professional guest profile
Full guest communication and maintenance coordination included
what_fell_flat: Year 1 projection (~£800/month after mortgage) does not hit his £1,000 target

conversion_gaps.gap: Income gap between Year 1 projection and £1,000 profit target
conversion_gaps.how_to_fill: Lead with 5-bed ADR premium in follow-up; show Year 2 direct booking ramp trajectory specifically

conversion_gaps.gap: Renovation dependency — no decision before Aug 2026
conversion_gaps.how_to_fill: Mid-July check-in to confirm renovation on track; confirm August 10 call two weeks prior

offer_framing: No offer made — standard 15% + VAT discussed
zac_close_phrase: Let's lock in August 10th — by then your renovation should be on track and we can finalise everything
zac_income_intro: Conservative 4-bed comparable: £1,805 net/month. 5-bed will sit in a premium bracket — Year 2 with direct bookings should clear your £1,000 profit target
zac_transition_phrases: The market conditions in Coventry are genuinely one of the better setups I've seen
The direct booking ramp is where Year 2 changes significantly
zac_reassurance_phrases: Maintenance above £300 requires your approval — you're always in control
Slack channel, 24-hour response, monthly statements — you'll always know what's happening
